meaning: adj.饮食的,有关饮食卫生的,食物疗法的
examples: The British Dietetic Association said eating breakfast was important for a balanced diet.
The American Dietetic Association suggests substituting two egg whites for one whole egg in many recipes.
The British Dietetic Association has warned parents against using soy formula during the first six months of a baby's life.
To find a registered dietitian, go to the American Dietetic Association website.
Rick Miller, a clinical dietician and spokesperson for the British Dietetic Association, said fad diets could cause major issues.
